creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hm,

thank you for suggesting a change to our documentation.

But I do not see the point in doing that.  The first link is already
there (section 5.7.1.1).  And in the same section we mention that "there
are comprehensive FAQs available on the same site".

So there is nothing left to do.  Meaning I will close this PR.

jkois@

- -- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
